column1: # Comments appear as inline annotations in dis.py output.

column2: extras.cpp: explosion/damage/projectile system
icons.cpp: tank and icon rendering
play.cpp: main game loop
player.cpp: player and tank management
ranges.cpp: terrain/mountain generation
shark.cpp: AI trajectory solver
shields.cpp: shield system
menu module: main menu/config UI and sub-dialogs
font module: Fastgraph text rendering (font_init/text_display/text_measure)
ai_inject_noise: scanning architecture — freq_base=PI/(2*noise_amp) freq_cap=2PI/10 amp=rand01*budget*0.5
ai_solver: AI trajectory solver start
generate_wind: formula rand(max_wind)-max_wind/4 range [-max/4 +3max/4); nested doubling 8% total
update_wind: per-turn wind update with +-MAX_WIND clamp
viscosity_clamp: clamp AIR_VISCOSITY to [0..20]; max constant DS:0x0408=20.0
apply_viscosity: formula 1.0-AIR_VISCOSITY/10000 per-step; skip when 1.0
apply_viscosity2: second viscosity application site (trajectory module)
main_menu: far address 34ED:1870; called from game loop at 0x2A850
weapon_fire_dispatch: call word far [bx+0x1200] — dispatches weapon behavior fn ptr
equip_init: initializes equipment/weapon shop; marks Laser/Plasma as accessories (NULL fn ptr)
apogee_detect: compares velocity sign against stored last-sign; triggers MIRV split on flip
sub_warhead_damage: damage=(radius-dist)*100/radius capped at 110
sub_warhead_spawn: spawns sub-warheads; param selects MIRV(0) vs DeathsHead(1) spread table
main_menu_right_panel: renders terrain preview and title on right side of main menu
targeting_line: laser sight display function; seg 2F76:01C1
targeting_pixel_cb: per-pixel callback — checks bounds/cavern; Laser blends Plasma overwrites
dialog_draw: dialog system render function at seg 3F19:024C
dialog_run: dialog system event loop at seg 3F19:045D
MAX_WIND: maximum wind speed (default 200; slider 5-500); per-turn clamp uses +-this
MKT_SENSITIVITY: market price adjustment multiplier = 0.05 (float64); NOT air viscosity
layout_mode: 0=spacious(25px rows) 1=compact(17px rows); same font both modes
highlight_color: UI highlight/selected-item color (pal 200 dynamic player color)
HUD_Y: HUD Y position
player_struct_base: far ptr to player struct array; stride 0x6C (108 bytes)
tank_struct_base: tank/sub struct array base; stride 0xCA (202 bytes)
weapon_struct_base: weapon struct array; stride 0x34 (52 bytes); index 2=Baby Missile
stack_limit: stack overflow check limit (compared in __stkchk)
sub_radius_table: [MIRV=20 DeathsHead=35] sub-warhead blast radius by param
sub_count_table: [MIRV=5 DeathsHead=9] sub-warhead count by param
setup_player_palette: sets VGA 0-79 = player colors (8 per player); slot 5 mod 8 = white(63
column6: 30); if sky==6 all black; then fg_setdacs(0

column2: setup_sky_ceiling_palette: if sky!=6 returns; sets VGA 110-149 from DS:DEA8 table; sets VGA 0-104 from DS:DD5E table (all black for Black sky); arg [bp+6]==0 = all-black variant
sky_gradient_base_index: base VGA palette index for sky gradient = 0x50=80; used as color in hline/vline calls for terrain borders
mkt_init_defaults: sets mkt_cost=base_price EMAs=0.1 for all 48 weapons
mkt_load: fopen("scorch.mkt"
column3: rb); validates version=2 count=48; clamps prices to [base*0.1

column2: mkt_save: remove+fopen("scorch.mkt"
mkt_update: per-round EMA-based market price adjustment; alpha=0.7 sensitivity=0.05
buy_weapon_inc_sold: inc [bx+0x1214] — increments weapon sold_qty for market demand tracking
FREE_MARKET: config toggle (0=disabled 1=enabled); gates MKT load/save/update
MKT_ALPHA: EMA smoothing factor = 0.7 (float64)
MKT_INIT: default EMA init value = 0.1 (float64); also minimum price ratio for validation
MKT_SIGNAL_DIV: price signal divisor = 10.0 (float32)
NUM_PLAYERS: total player count (runtime); used to normalize demand in market update
WEAPON_COUNT: total weapons in economy = 48
pcx_filename: "scorch.pcx" — optional user-provided background image
pcx_display: B-key handler — push ds/offset; fg_pcxopen; fg_pcxhead; fg_pcximage; no error check
play_loop_switch_table: 80 word entries at CS:0x05DB; index = (scancode-2)*2; dispatches gameplay input
